title: VFX Asset Inventory
description: Consolidated inventory of all CG assets, environments, FX setups, and comp templates required for the project. Each asset is cross-referenced to every shot that uses it.

description.description: What this asset is and its role in the story

requirements.description: Technical build requirements (e.g., 'Photo-realistic metal textures; full body rig; facial animation; multiple damage states')

complexity.description: 0=N/A or practical, 1=simple (screen content/paint fix), 2=moderate (matte painting/simple CG), 3=standard (rigged CG asset), 4=complex (hero CG with multiple states), 5=hero (photoreal character/creature with full performance)

variants.description: Different states or versions needed (e.g., clean, damaged, wet, night)

shot_count.description: Total number of shots this asset appears in

shots_used_in.description: Shot numbers where this asset is used
